name: 2'x3' Washable Leaf Harvest Scatter Woven Accent Rug Cream/Orange/Green - Room Essentials™
description:
Add seasonal style to your floor with this Washable Leaf Harvest Scatter Woven Accent Rug from Room Essentials™. Showcasing a harvest leaf print in a cream, orange and green hue, this woven accent rug adds lovely flair to your floor space while blending easily with your existing decor. The woven rectangular rug features a low-pile construction that is suitable for use in high-traffic areas, while the latex backing helps keep the rug from sliding and slipping.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
